title: tragopogon marginatus
intro: Tragopogon marginatus, also known as salsify or meadow salsify, is a perennial plant belonging to the dandelion family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which contain inulin, a type of fiber that can help lower cholesterol levels and improve digestion. The health benefits of Tragopogon marginatus include reducing inflammation, improving blood sugar control, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or capsules, and are often used to treat a range of ailments, including digestive issues and skin problems.
